name: Color Block Out!
description: Slide, match, and clear colorful blocks in this addictive puzzle adventure! Move each block to its matching door, avoid tricky blockers, and solve clever levels before time runs out. Easy to play but hard to master, Color Block Out! is packed with satisfying moves, vibrant visuals, and brain-teasing challenges that keep you coming back for more.
instructions: Drag and slide the block to the gate with matching color
